creator: trashcan@ellael.org
text:
Which version of clang ist used for pre-compiled packages at pkg.FreeBSD.org?

Today poudriere compiled the newly committed bind-tools-9.20.1 using a pre-fetched protobuf-c-1.4.1_3 package.

This resulted in the following error from 'host':

mike> host freebsd.org
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf-c.so.1: version LIBPROTOBUF_C_1.0.0 required by /usr/local/lib/bind-tools/libdns-9.20.1.so not defined

First, I downgraded bind-tools by 'pkg add -f bind-tools-9.18.29.pkg' but to now avail, same error.

Only, after recompiling libprotobuf, libprotobuf-c, and bind-tools from source (poudriere) and reinstallin, this error has gone.

I don't know if this has any relevance to this PR and/or clang version >= 18
